shortDescription: Spacious 3-bedroom detached home on a quiet street in Old Mill with mature trees and a private backyard.
fullDescription: Welcome to 18 Humber Trail in the vibrant Old Mill neighbourhood. This beautifully presented detached home offers generous living space across multiple levels. The main living area impresses with nine-foot ceilings, designer fixtures, and a seamless flow between rooms. The kitchen has been fully renovated with soft-close cabinetry, stone counters, and a breakfast bar. Upstairs, 3 bright bedrooms include a primary retreat with ensuite and double closets. A private outdoor space — perfect for morning coffee or summer entertaining — completes the package. Transit, cycling infrastructure, and the best of Toronto’s cultural scene are right at your doorstep.
keyFeatures: Steps to TTC subway and streetcar
Modern eat-in kitchen with stainless steel appliances
